original_question:
Tom, Dick and Harry started out on a $100$-mile journey. Tom and Harry went by automobile at the rate of $25$ mph, while Dick walked at the rate of $5$ mph. After a certain distance, Harry got off and walked on at $5$ mph, while Tom went back for Dick and got him to the destination at the same time that Harry arrived. Calculate the number of hours required for the trip.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}

similar_questions.question: Alice, Bob, and Charlie started out on a $150$-mile journey. Alice and Charlie went by automobile at the rate of $30$ mph, while Bob walked at the rate of $6$ mph. After a certain distance, Charlie got off and walked on at $6$ mph, while Alice went back for Bob and got him to the destination at the same time that Charlie arrived. Calculate the number of hours required for the trip.

Eve, Frank, and Grace started out on a $200$-mile journey. Eve and Grace went by automobile at the rate of $40$ mph, while Frank walked at the rate of $8$ mph. After a certain distance, Grace got off and walked on at $8$ mph, while Eve went back for Frank and got him to the destination at the same time that Grace arrived. Calculate the number of hours required for the trip.

Gina, Henry, and Ian started out on a $120$-mile journey. Gina and Ian went by automobile at the rate of $35$ mph, while Henry walked at the rate of $7$ mph. After a certain distance, Ian got off and walked on at $7$ mph, while Gina went back for Henry and got him to the destination at the same time that Ian arrived. Calculate the number of hours required for the trip.

Jack, Karen, and Leo started out on a $180$-mile journey. Jack and Leo went by automobile at the rate of $45$ mph, while Karen walked at the rate of $9$ mph. After a certain distance, Leo got off and walked on at $9$ mph, while Jack went back for Karen and got her to the destination at the same time that Leo arrived. After a certain distance, Oscar got off and walked on at $10$ mph, while Mike went back for Nora and got her to the destination at the same time that Oscar arrived.
